hooks.command: jq -r 'select((.tool_input.file_path // "") | endswith("messages/en.json")) | {hookSpecificOutput: {hookEventName: "PostToolUse", additionalContext: "messages/en.json was just edited — sync the new or changed keys into messages/fr.json and messages/es.json using the i18n-sync skill (.claude/skills/i18n-sync/SKILL.md), keeping idiomatic locale-natural phrasing per the skill register rules (FR=vous, ES=tú)."}}'
